name: AI & Data Solutions Engineer
tagline: Build software, work with data, ship dashboards, and integrate AI into real products.
description: A well-rounded path from Python foundations to applied AI, built around real business problems and a portfolio-quality flagship project. Long-term aim: technical leadership, solutions architecture, and FinTech.

milestones.title: Python Foundations & Professional Setup
milestones.learning_goal: Build a strong Python foundation and a professional development workflow.

weekend_project.title: PC File Organizer
weekend_project.brief: Write a Python tool that sorts a messy folder into clean subfolders by file type, with a tidy repo behind it.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Which part of your setup (venv, Git, VS Code) will save you the most time going forward?

milestones.title: SQL & Databases
milestones.learning_goal: Store and manage real application data with SQL and a relational database.

weekend_project.title: Expense Tracker Database
weekend_project.brief: Design a schema for expenses and categories, then read and write to it from Python.

milestones.reflection_prompt: How did you decide what belongs in its own table versus a single column?

milestones.title: Data & Analytics
milestones.learning_goal: Transform raw data into useful insights with pandas and clear exploratory analysis.

weekend_project.title: Expense Analytics
weekend_project.brief: Analyse your expense data (or a public dataset), surface trends, and chart the findings in a notebook.

milestones.reflection_prompt: What was the most surprising thing the data told you that you couldn't see before?

milestones.title: Visualization & BI
milestones.learning_goal: Present information professionally and turn analysis into a business-ready dashboard.

weekend_project.title: Business Intelligence Dashboard
weekend_project.brief: Build a single-screen dashboard with clear KPIs that answers one real business question.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Could a busy manager understand your main insight in under ten seconds?

milestones.title: Software Engineering & APIs
milestones.learning_goal: Convert scripts into real applications with a documented REST API.

weekend_project.title: Expense Tracker API
weekend_project.brief: Expose your expense tracker through a FastAPI service with CRUD endpoints and basic tests.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Where does your API handle bad input, and where could it still break?

milestones.title: Applied AI
milestones.learning_goal: Build software that is genuinely enhanced by AI, not just decorated with it.

weekend_project.title: AI Financial Assistant
weekend_project.brief: Add an LLM-powered feature to your expense tracker that answers questions about a user's spending.

milestones.reflection_prompt: How do you keep the assistant's answers grounded in the user's actual data?

milestones.title: Portfolio & Professional Polish
milestones.learning_goal: Assemble a portfolio ready for internship and Werkstudent applications in Germany.

weekend_project.title: Portfolio Version 1.0
weekend_project.brief: Polish your strongest project into a flagship: clean repo, professional README, screenshots, and a short write-up.

milestones.reflection_prompt: If a recruiter only opened one of your repos, which would it be — and is it ready?
